setup.description: Start local S3-backed AgentsView, verify its web UI, or connect the host client to an existing container service.

status.description: Check whether the host AgentsView CLI can reach the container service and list its indexed projects.

find.description: Find and filter recorded agent sessions by project, agent, date, activity, outcome, or health metadata.

inspect.description: Inspect one recorded session's metadata, transcript messages, tool calls, health signals, or token usage.

search.description: Search recorded session history for prior decisions, instructions, examples, errors, files, or commands.

report.description: Retrieve factual AgentsView stats, activity, cost, and token totals for a local date window.
